classifications.phrase: maintain the targets of 10 basis points for the cash rate
purchase an additional $100 billion of bonds
Inflation remains low and below central bank targets
strong growth in employment and a welcome decline in the unemployment rate
Wage and price pressures remain subdued
inflation and wages growth are expected to pick up, but to do so only gradually
The Board remains committed to maintaining highly supportive monetary conditions
The Board will not increase the cash rate until actual inflation is sustainably within the…
The Board does not expect these conditions to be met until 2024 at the earliest

payload.rationale: The RBA maintains accommodative policy settings with no rate increases expected until 2024, citing subdued inflation and wage pressures despite strong near-term growth and employment improvements.
